12.01 | Appendix A: Cumulative Probabilities for a Standard Normal Distribution

Module 12：付録A〜E（Appendices A–E）12.01｜付録A：標準正規分布（Standard Normal Distribution）の累積確率（Cumulative Probabilities）

  Appendix A
 Cumulative Probabilities for a Standard Normal Distribution
 P(Z ≤ x) = N(x) for x ≥ 0 or P(Z ≤ z) = N(z) for z ≥ 0

  Appendix A (continued)
 Cumulative Probabilities for a Standard Normal Distribution
 P(Z ≤ x) = N(x) for x ≤ 0 or P(Z ≤ z) = N(z) for z ≤ 0
